data.body: Security fix: closed token-purpose-confusion (state->session) in auth/lib/cookie.js verify() by rejecting purpose-labeled tokens (LLM-Review finding on 683). Re-applied; auth-host redeployed; plan clean; SSO healthy. Amended story A commit + re-pushed patchset 2. Verified NO secrets clobbered (all /rebar/prod/* + /auth-solutions/* values intact; ignore_changes=[value] holds).
